personas.name: Emotionally Overwhelmed Support Seeker
personas.description: A user experiencing anxiety, depression, emotional distress, or mental health recovery challenges who uses Wysa for nonjudgmental support, coping guidance, and immediate emotional relief.
goals: Receive immediate emotional support during difficult moments
Reduce anxiety, stress, or negative thinking
Feel heard without fear of judgment
Use the app as a calming and supportive mental health tool
pain_points: Struggles with anxiety, depression, or emotional overload
Needs support during moments of intense distress or hopelessness
May feel isolated or unable to speak openly with others
Needs supportive responses that feel safe and reassuring
context: Using the app during emotionally difficult periods
Seeking help with stress, depression, anxiety, or suicidal thoughts
Turning to the app for comfort, reassurance, and emotional grounding
constraints: Support must feel empathetic and nonjudgmental
Responses must be available quickly when the user is distressed
The app must avoid responses that worsen emotional state

personas.name: Self-Guided Wellness Improver
personas.description: A user actively working on personal growth and emotional wellness through CBT exercises, meditation, breathing techniques, and guided self-help tools.
goals: Use CBT tools to reframe negative thoughts
Practice guided meditation and breathing exercises
pain_points: Struggles with stress and emotional regulation
Requires guided exercises that are easy to follow
context: Uses the app regularly for mindfulness practice
Accesses guided exercises during stressful situations
constraints: Exercises must be clear and actionable
Meditation and CBT tools must be easy to access

personas.name: Personalized AI Conversation User
personas.description: A user who expects intelligent, relevant, and personalized AI conversations with memory across sessions.
context: Uses the chatbot frequently for emotional conversations

personas.name: Inclusive and Accessibility-Focused User
personas.description: A user who values accessibility features, multilingual support, and an inclusive user experience that accommodates different needs.
goals: Use the app comfortably regardless of language
Use accessibility support tools when needed
constraints: App must support accessible UI design

personas.name: Cost-Conscious Premium User
personas.description: A user concerned with subscription cost, premium feature access, and perceived value of paid services.
goals: Access useful features at reasonable cost
context: Evaluating whether the subscription is worth paying for
